name: Quesadilla Crispers
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup diced canned green chilies, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook sausage until done, breaking it up as it cooks.
2. Combine the cooked sausage, beans, onion, chilies, and cheese in a bowl. The mixture should be about 1-1/2 cups.
3. Cut each tortilla into quarters.
4. Place about 1 teaspoon of the bean mixture in the center of each tortilla quarter.
5. Brush the edges of the tortilla with the flour and water mixture.
6. Fold the tortillas in half, pressing to seal them. Keep covered as you work.
7. Repeat until all tortillas are assembled. Let stand for 5 minutes before frying to allow the edges to stick together.
8. Deep fry 3 or 4 tortillas at a time for 2 minutes.
9. Drain on paper towels.
10. Alternatively, cut the tortillas into 8 pieces and fry in hot oil. Serve the bean dip with fried chips.
